headline: Can GE Aerospace Boost Margin Performance Amid Cost Pressures?
summary: GE faces cost pressures, but strong aerospace demand, LEAP deliveries and backlog execution could help lift margins and profit in 2026.

raw.headline: Can GE Aerospace Boost Margin Performance Amid Cost Pressures?

headline: Is Textron Stock Underperforming the S&P 500?
summary: Textron has lagged behind the S&P 500 Index over the past year, and analysts remain somewhat bullish about the stock’s growth prospects.

raw.headline: Is Textron Stock Underperforming the S&P 500?
